CustomField.label: Row Groups
CustomField.description: Ordered list of row grouping field API names, one per line. The first line is the outermost (top-level) group, each subsequent line adds a nested level. Supports relationship paths (e.g. ShareClass__r.Fund__r.ProductName__c).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter one field API name per line, outermost group first. Example: ShareClass__r.Fund__r.ProductName__c ShareClass__r.Name__c ShareClass__r.ISIN__c
